MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Li Ya Yu is present. Represented by
Attorney June M. Lee appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Richard Hoan Quoc Truong is present in pro per. Lily Kwan appeared as interpreter for Defendant.

The Supervising Attorney Paul Gutierrez, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 525, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled per supervising attorney P. Gutierrez, the trial date of NOV-7-2011 is vacated.
